column1: # wiki_image_provenance.tsv -- binds each PINNED wiki Docker image digest to the
# CM044 source commit it was built from.
# WHY THIS FILE EXISTS
# The wiki-compiler / wiki-site images ship in the DMG pinned by digest in
# install.sh (`image: ghcr.io/ostler-ai/ostler-<key>@sha256:...`). The image
# metadata carries NO org.opencontainers.image.revision label and no CM044 sha
# in its config/env, so the source commit an image was built from cannot be
# read back from the registry. Without a recorded binding, a repin of the
# digest that lags CM044 main ships silently -- exactly how the privacy fixes
# CM044 #121 / #122 (BUG-038) missed a cut.
# scripts/verify_cut_freshness.sh reads the digest pinned in install.sh for
# each image-key, looks it up HERE, and compares the recorded CM044 sha to
# CM044 main HEAD (live GitHub). FAIL-CLOSED: a pinned digest with NO row here
# is UNVERIFIABLE -> RED. A repin without a matching row cannot pass the gate.
# The ORM MUST add/update a row here whenever it repins a wiki image (the same
# step that edits the install.sh digest). The image-content integrity (does the
# recorded sha actually match what is baked in) is separately proven by the
# wiki_image_grep markers in scripts/cut_markers.manifest.
# Format (TAB-separated, 3 fields). Lines starting with '#' and blank lines
# are ignored.
#   <image-key>   <digest>                <cm044_source_sha>
# image-key is `wiki-compiler` or `wiki-site` (matches the install.sh pin).
# Current pins (both re-pinned to the CM044 77300f6 build = post-#142 v1.0.10
# red-team wave-2: nh3-sole-authority XSS gate + private-contact key-dates leak
# fix + broadcast-gate sweep, on top of the #140 lockdown set). Supersedes the
# earlier 2d9d5d9a (#140) build. Note the site image digest also moved this
# round because #142 edited compiler/html_sanitise.py, which Dockerfile.site
# copies into the site image.
wiki-compiler
wiki-site
